summary: Iteration 43 - P0/P1 Bug Fix Verification Complete. Both timing display bugs are FIXED. Program detail hero now shows duration, start_date, timing, timezone and localized time conversion. Upcoming programs cards show timing with user's local timezone.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Program ID 5 (Quad Layer Healing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0/P1 timing bugs are fixed. Program ID 5 has timing='7:00 PM - 8:30 PM' and time_zone='GST Dubai'. The frontend shows localized 'Your Time' conversion in blue text when user's timezone differs from program timezone.

verified_elements: Timing: '7:00 PM - 8:30 PM GST Dubai' visible
Localized time: '3:00 PM Your Time (UTC)' visible in blue
Timing: '7:00 PM - 8:30 PM GST Dubai' visible on card
Localized time: '3:00 PM Your Time (UTC)' visible below timing in blue
No timing section displayed for program with empty timing field
Only duration '90 days' shown in hero
Session Timing field with value '7:00 PM - 8:30 PM'

test_classes: TestProgramTimingAPI (5 tests) - Program 5 timing, time_zone, duration, start_date, is_upcoming
TestProgramWithoutTiming (2 tests) - Program 1 has empty timing/time_zone
TestUpcomingProgramsEndpoint (1 test) - Filter endpoint returns Program 5
TestProgramUpdateAPI (1 test) - Full response structure validation
